events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: crew used field method for conductor selection & sizing less tidy than preferred shop approach but still matches listed product instructions and project requirement. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. Reference NEC 310 Table 310.16. Work in-progress. Need decision likely pass because field method acceptable if matches product instructions and project requirements, no code violation. Risk low. Need fill fields. component_conditions none flagged -> empty list. percent_complete maybe 50? value? Not asked numeric reading, maybe 0. sound_source etc default empty string? Schema says sound_source source of sound when asked; can be empty string. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. findings empty, actions empty. rationale brief. references NEC 310, Table 310.16. Need ensure valid JSON.
